languages.text: "Слышал, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}вы спасли жизнь{/d} сержанту-инструктору Йовахе". {n}Некоторое время Иждриг молчит, а затем, наконец, коротко кивает.{/n} "Спасибо".
"I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."
languages.original_text: "Слышал, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}вы спасли жизнь{/d} сержанту-инструктору Йовахе". {n}Некоторое время Иждриг молчит, а затем, наконец, коротко кивает.{/n} "Спасибо".

traits.locale_text: "I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."
"I heard you saved Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."

"I heard you saved the life of Drill Sergeant Jovakha." {n}Batoshski is silent for a while, as if trying to recall what the done thing is in these circumstances, and finally forces out the words:{/n} "Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"I heard you saved the life of Drill Sergeant Jovakha." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then he nods shortly.{/n} "Thank you."
"I heard you saved Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."
"I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."

languages.text: « Il paraît que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}vous avez sauvé{/d} la vie du sergent-instructeur Jovakha. » {n}Izdrig se tait quelques instants, puis opine légèrement du chef.{/n} « Merci. »
languages.original_text: "I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."

traits.locale_text: « Il paraît que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}vous avez sauvé{/d} la vie du sergent-instructeur Jovakha. » {n}Izdrig se tait quelques instants, puis opine légèrement du chef.{/n} « Merci. »

languages.text: «Me han contado que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}le ha salvado la vida{/d} al sargento de instrucción Jovakha». {n}Izdrig guarda silencio durante un instante, y luego asiente ligeramente con la cabeza.{/n} «Gracias».
languages.original_text: "I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."

traits.locale_text: «Me han contado que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}le ha salvado la vida{/d} al sargento de instrucción Jovakha». {n}Izdrig guarda silencio durante un instante, y luego asiente ligeramente con la cabeza.{/n} «Gracias».

languages.text: “听说{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}您救了{/d}操练军士约瓦哈一命。”{n}伊兹德里格沉默了一会儿，微微点了点头。{/n}“谢谢。”
languages.original_text: "I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."

traits.locale_text: “听说{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}您救了{/d}操练军士约瓦哈一命。”{n}伊兹德里格沉默了一会儿，微微点了点头。{/n}“谢谢。”

languages.text: "Ich hörte, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}Ihr habt{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha das Leben gerettet." {n}Izdrig schweigt eine Weile und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Danke."
languages.original_text: "I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hörte, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}Ihr habt{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha das Leben gerettet." {n}Izdrig schweigt eine Weile und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Danke."

languages.text: "Talim Çavuşu Jovakha'nın {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}canını kurtardığını{/d} duydum." {n}İzdrig, bir süre sessiz kalıp sonrasında hafifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Teşekkür ederim."
languages.original_text: "I heard {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}you saved{/d} Drill Sergeant Jovakha's life." {n}Izdrig is silent for a while and then nods slightly.{/n} "Thank you."

traits.locale_text: "Talim Çavuşu Jovakha'nın {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_JovakhaSaved}canını kurtardığını{/d} duydum." {n}İzdrig, bir süre sessiz kalıp sonrasında hafifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Teşekkür ederim."

languages.text: 「ジョヴァカ大尉の命を救ったと聞いた」{n}バトシュスキーはしばらく沈黙し、この状況ですべきことを思い出そうとしているようだが、ついに言葉を絞り出す。{/n}「ありがとうございます、陛下」
languages.original_text: "I heard you saved the life of Drill Sergeant Jovakha." {n}Batoshski is silent for a while, as if trying to recall what the done thing is in these circumstances, and finally forces out the words:{/n} "Thank you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
